title: PlanReviewCoachInputsOutput
description: OUTPUT of `plan_review_coach_inputs`: the prompt-template `plan` text, the Pass-4 coach `instructions` (move registry + coachable-findings listing), and `findings` — the coachable union (blocking first, then surviving advisory; story 8086) that drives the coach_gate branch and the coach prompt's surviving binding.

plan.description: The assembled plan text (PlanContext.plan_text) — resolves the coach prompt's {{plan}}.

instructions.description: The Pass-4 coach instructions: the same move-registry + coachable-findings listing the bespoke pass4_coach builds.

findings.description: Blocking + surviving findings (blocking first) fed to coach_gate and the coach prompt.
